## Snapshot Summary
Merlin Labs positions this role around simulation environments, desktop testing environments, piloted simulators, cloud environments, synthetic sensor data, and cross-functional engineering integration. The posting also highlights modern software engineering practices and continuous integration expectations.

## Technical Signals Captured

- desktop testing environments
- CI standards and code review
- graphics or terrain pipeline collaboration
- Simulink and React/front-end experience listed as preferred
